title: Find how improve workflow sends Discord messages

log.context: Find how improve workflow sends Discord messages

There is no dedicated `improve_wf.py`. The "improve" workflow is actually the `HourlyIntrospectionWorkflow` — it periodically posts `[improve]` as a trigger message to BigClungus. Here's the full picture:

---

**There is no standalone improve workflow file.** The `[improve]` trigger is sent by the introspection workflow.
